docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Remove the deprecated 'version' field from docker-compose.yml to align with modern Compose specification standards.
Rename the database container to a generic name for consistency.
Add a healthcheck to the PostgreSQL service to ensure it is ready before dependent services start.
docker-compose.yml.after:
healthcheck:
      test: ["CMD-SHELL", "pg_isready -U postgres"]
      interval: 10s
      timeout: 5s
      retries: 5

docker-compose.yml.general_idea: Add the application service definition to docker-compose.yml to run the Spring Boot app alongside the database.
docker-compose.yml.after:
app:
    container_name: app
    image: omerfarukgenc34/spring-boot-boilerplate:3.3.1
    ports:
      - "8080:8080"
    environment:
      - "POSTGRES_DB_SERVER_ADDRESS=db"
      - "POSTGRES_DB_SERVER_PORT=5432"
      - "POSTGRES_USER=postgres"
      - "POSTGRES_PASSWORD=example"
    healthcheck:
      test: "curl --fail --silent localhost:8080/actuator/health/readiness | grep UP || exit 1"
      interval: 2s
      timeout: 3s
      retries: 5
      start_period: 2s
    depends_on:
      db:
        condition: service_healthy

pom.xml.general_idea: Upgrade Spring Boot parent version to 3.3.1 to align with Java 17 and Spring Boot 3 ecosystem.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x requires Java 17 as the baseline; Spring Boot 2.7.x is incompatible with Spring Boot 3 APIs and dependencies.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update Java version property to 17 to match the target JDK.
pom.xml.why_exists: Spring Boot 3.x enforces Java 17 minimum; compiling with Java 11 property will fail or produce incompatible bytecode.

pom.xml.general_idea: Replace springdoc-openapi-ui with springdoc-openapi-starter-webmvc-ui for Spring Boot 3 compatibility.
pom.xml.why_exists: The old artifact 'springdoc-openapi-ui' is not compatible with Spring Boot 3; the new starter artifact is required for OpenAPI support.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update springdoc-openapi version to 2.6.0 to match the new starter artifact.
pom.xml.why_exists: Version 1.6.11 is for the old Spring Boot 2 compatible artifact; version 2.x is required for the new starter.

pom.xml.general_idea: Add lombok-mapstruct-binding dependency to resolve annotation processor conflicts in Spring Boot 3.
pom.xml.why_exists: Without this binding, Lombok and MapStruct annotation processors may conflict or fail to generate code correctly in newer environments.
Spring Boot 3 uses JUnit 5 exclusively; the vintage engine is no longer needed or supported in the same way, and the exclusion block is removed to clean up configuration.

pom.xml.general_idea: Update project groupId, artifactId, and version to reflect new branding and versioning.
Update description to reflect Spring Boot 3.3.1 and Open API.
Fix developer name spelling from 'Faruk Genç' to 'Faruk Genc'.

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Enable HTTP/2 support in the embedded server configuration.
Externalize database connection properties using environment variables with defaults.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
url: jdbc:postgresql://localhost:5432/
    username: postgres
    password: example

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Configure HikariCP pool name for better observability.
Remove explicit Hibernate dialect configuration as it is auto-detected in newer Spring Boot versions.
Disable Open-in-View to prevent lazy loading issues and improve performance.
Remove verbose SQL logging and formatting configurations.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
show-sql: true
      format-sql: true
      type: info
      use-sql-comments: true
      properties:
        hibernate.use_sql_comments: true
        hibernate.format_sql: true

src/main/resources/application.yml.general_idea: Update SpringDoc configuration to remove deprecated or unnecessary path/package scanning settings.
Enable Kubernetes-style liveness and readiness probes in Spring Boot Actuator.
Update logging level package name to reflect the new artifact/group ID structure.
Update Swagger metadata to reflect the new Spring Boot version and description.
src/main/resources/application.yml.before:
app-description: "Spring Boot Boilerplate is a starter kit. This project includes : Spring Boot(2.7.4)..."
-  app-version: 2.0.0
src/main/resources/application.yml.after:
app-description: "Spring Boot Boilerplate is a starter kit. This project includes : Spring Boot(3.3.1)..."
+  app-version: 3.3.1
